summary: Tested 'Broken Promise' bug fix in Core System self-edit pipeline. The fix adds pre-identification of target files in 'All Core System' mode and file context injection during broken promise retry. VERIFIED WORKING: Backend logs show '[SelfEdit-AllCore] Pre-identified target: components/dashboard/Dashboard.jsx (60019 chars)' and '[SelfEdit-StreamResult] {"textLen":108,"toolCallCount":1,"toolNames":["patch_files"]}' confirming the AI calls patch_files tool instead of just responding with text.

minor.issue: Some patches fail due to search string not found (1 of 3 patches failed in test), but partial results are saved correctly

critical_code_review_comments: identifyTargetFile() function at line 31 correctly implements 3 strategies: exact path match, filename match, and keyword-to-file mapping
Pre-identification at line 749 correctly calls identifyTargetFile() when selfEditTarget.path is null (All Core System mode)
File content is loaded and injected into system prompt at line 763 with proper truncation for large files (>60000 chars)
Broken promise retry at line 1398-1441 correctly detects when AI promises action but doesn't call tool, and injects file context
Dashboard.jsx correctly passes selfEditTarget to stream options at line 1225

success_rate.backend: 100% (pre-identification logic fires correctly, patch_files tool is called)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Core System UI loads, target dropdown works, chat interface functional)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Broken Promise' bug fix is verified working. Key evidence: (1) Backend log '[SelfEdit-AllCore] Pre-identified target: components/dashboard/Dashboard.jsx' confirms pre-identification fires, (2) '[SelfEdit-StreamResult] {toolCallCount:1,toolNames:["patch_files"]}' confirms AI calls the tool instead of just text, (3) '[SelfEdit] Saved 1 file(s): components/dashboard/Dashboard.jsx' confirms file was saved. The fix correctly identifies target files from user messages using keyword mapping (e.g., 'CSV export button to Dashboard' -> Dashboard.jsx).

tool_call_instead_of_text.note: toolCallCount > 0 confirms AI called patch_files tool

broken_promise_retry.note: Retry logic with file context injection is implemented correctly

ui_verification.core_system_navigation: PASS - Core System tab navigates to workspace
ui_verification.target_dropdown: PASS - Shows all 20 self-edit targets including 'All Core System'
ui_verification.chat_interface: PASS - Textarea, send button, status messages all functional
ui_verification.ai_response: PASS - AI responds with action (patches) not just text promises
